subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Threshold of the Abhá Beauty, may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones! The detailed letter was carefully considered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله ابهی ای بنده آستان جمال ابهی روحی لاحبائه الفدا مکتوب مفصل بدقت ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @being a source of light; guidance, @firmness in the Covenant
